highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical College and Research Institute.

review_content.Placements: We can easily get placements without any doubt. Our seniors are in good positions in the medical field so there is no worry about placements. Everyone will get an internship of 1-year span and get salaries too of Rs. 30,000 per month. However, we have to work somewhat more as we get night shifts. Other than that there is no worry about placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is fine and good. There are not many complaints about the infrastructure, but the only thing I have a problem with is the food here. They use banking soda more in the food. There is no Wi-Fi facility here. Medical facilities are good here. We have reading rooms and a library here, so there is no disturbance to study.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: A government college is the best for placements due to its high patient inflow. It helps you to get placed better. They improve your practical knowledge. I would recommend joining this college. Our college is good in all aspects.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. We don't have a canteen, Wi-Fi, etc. They provide sports facilities. We have classrooms, libraries, labs, etc. It is a new college.
review_content.Faculty: Our college has the best teachers. They provide good knowledge. They improve our skills. The curriculum and exams are the same as the Karnataka state's RGUHS curriculum.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I would recommend students to join this college.

review_content.Placements: It is a government medical college so there are no placements. Students mostly choose to pursue their MD and MS by cracking NEET and NEXT exams. Many students are interested to apply for PLAB or USMLE. Students can apply to work in the government sector or choose to do PG courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has 13-stroyed buildings. Our campus is spacious. This college is attached to three hospitals, so there is no lack of patient inflow. Hostel is very good. Our college has volleyball and basketball courts. There is unlimited Wi-Fi in the girls' hostel. The food served in the mess is very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best colleges in BLR.

review_content.Placements: Our college is located in the center of Bangalore and a very old hospital is attached to it. Students get good exposure. Research is very good in our college. Students get a stipend of Rs.30,000 per month during the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college has 13 floors with well-developed classrooms, labs, and a library. The library is open till 7:30 PM. The quality of food served in the mess is good. It serves both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food items. Students can get easy access to street food and transportation facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has great environment to study.

review_content.Placements: As this is the first batch of our college, students didn't reach placements. Since it is a government college, there is a high probability of getting good work opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is one of the best 2 government colleges in Bangalore. The new 13 floors building is in the center of Bangalore. Our college provides new hostels with a lot of improvements in the pipeline. Hospital is busy all day as there are plenty of cases.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers in our college are highly qualified. Most of them are from top colleges. The teaching quality is very good. The course curriculum is relevant. Our college conducts many exams but everyone who gets into this course can handle them. The pass percentage is very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am highly satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: There are around 150 students in our batch. Around 85% of seats are filled through KEA, which is controlled by Karnat Government, and the rest 15% of seats are filled through AQI counseling. After completing UG studies in our college, there are no placements, but we have the assurance of job security in all government hospitals. We can continue our studies after internships and rural services. We are the second batch of this college,
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is old. Our campus is located in the heart of the city. There is no transportation problem. Security is average on campus. Our college has the best building in Karnataka, which is newly constructed. Everything is new in our college. Mess is better, and hostels are maintained well. Our college does not have a playground.

Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. highlights.summary:

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Can Maharaja Agrasen Medical College be considered as a reputed Institute?
faqs.answer: Maharaja Agrasen Medical College is a distinguished institution offering MD, MS, GNM, DNB, MBBS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing field. Maharaja Agrasen Medical College is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Maharaja Agrasen Medical College has received an impressive review rating of 4.46 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 4.15 for Campus Life, 4.77 for Placements, 4.69 for Faculty, and 4.08 for Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Does Maharaja Agrasen Medical College has good and experienced faculty?
faqs.answer: Maharaja Agrasen Medical College has a Faculty review rating of 4.69 by students. This represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: What is the overall intake at Maharaja Agrasen Medical College for all courses together?
faqs.answer: The seats availability for offered courses at Maharaja Agrasen Medical College goes up to 202. Courses offerred by Maharaja Agrasen Medical College are approved by eminent Government bodies such as NMC, INC.
A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Maharaja Agrasen Medical College is approximately INR 225000 - INR 881280.

The institute has specializations in Anesthesiology, Biochemistry, Forensic Medical Science, Pathology, Pharmacology, Physiology, Community Medicine, Anatomy, Ophthalmology, General Surgery, Orthopaedics, General Nursing & Midwifery, General Medicine.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college is the best and good for those who want to become better doctors and help the needful.

review_content.Placements: In the college, there are 100 seats per batch. The highest package is for the students doing PG here. They can even go abroad. In internship, a 25k per month salary is given. The doctors from this college have even been placed in AIIMS, AFMC, and PGI Chandigarh. The internship is done here because the college has its own hospital, which has 2000 patients visiting per day. The college is trusted by Jindal and family. It has the best opportunity.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. It has separate grounds for every sport. In 2023, a new sports complex was formed. The academics are also the best. The labs are very good, and in Haryana, this college has the best faculty. The study environment is very good. The DH, biochem, and patho labs are all the best.

reviews_list.batch_info: General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Beauty lies in MAMC, Agroha.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides us the best placement. It is providing us the best practical experience as we go on duty daily from the last 6 months for about 6 hours. Students who studied in this college get chance to prove themselves in foreign countries like Japan, Australia, Canada, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very well developed, completely representing a professional college with professional labs and classrooms equipped with smart boards. Also, the college has a well-developed wi-fi, and the library here offers us a book section of more than 2000 books, which is enormous.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Appropriate to pursue MBBS. Satisfied because of faculty.

review_content.Placements: Ima MBBS 2020 batch student. I will pass out in year 2025. During period of internship monthly 17k is paid to intern doctor. About 50 percent students got placement. Normally 80-90k package would be offered at time of placement. In Haryana, selection percentage in Post Graduation course is the highest in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facilities are available in academics branch. But it is not available for students it can be accessed by staff only. In hostels no Wi-Fi facility is availed by college authorities students have to purchase Wi-Fi facility personally. Library and reading hall is spacious. Mess food quality is poor but hygiene is maintained properly.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Very good college for pursuing medicine. Very cooperative and hardworking teachers.

review_content.Placements: In medical courses like MBBS the is not anything like placement, In MBBS after completion of course student can opt for higher studies like specialty kr superspecialty. If student don't want to study further the he can be a medical officer or can do his own practice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is fairly good, has fully AC lecture theraters, Good number of patients visiting the hospital, has examination hall, a central library, all departments has very good practical labs. Hostel are new with all facilities, has indoor games and outdoor games. Mess is very good. All hostels has good water and electricity supply.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This college in clinical setup is no less than any AIIMS.

review_content.Placements: Our college is good. There is a scope in this course and provides good placements after this course. The average salary offered is 1 lakh, after deducting tax it is Rs 87,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and there are many buildings. There are two libraries one is a central library and the other is the paramedical library. The paramedical library is newly formed in our college. Food quality is average in our mess.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. They are always ready to help students, and the course curriculum is relevant. It also makes students industry-ready. Semester exam is beneficial, and they make preparations better and more focused on study.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Come to our college to become a doctor.

review_content.Placements: Our batch consists of 100 students. Students got seats in college based on NEET rank. Everyone is eligible to do internship in our attached hospital after passing the final professional exam as per the university guidelines. We get Rs.17,000 stipend during internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are average in our college. Mess food qualities are quite good. We have two libraries. Our hospital patient load is excellent enough to learn clinical skills. There is a separate covid buliding. Our campus is full of greenery. It seems like it's on the lap of nature.

review_summary.college_name: Maharaja Agrasen Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is the best and good for those who want to become better doctors and help the needful.

content.Placements: In the college, there are 100 seats per batch. The highest package is for the students doing PG here. They can even go abroad. In internship, a 25k per month salary is given. The doctors from this college have even been placed in AIIMS, AFMC, and PGI Chandigarh. The internship is done here because the college has its own hospital, which has 2000 patients visiting per day. The college is trusted by Jindal and family. It has the best opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. It has separate grounds for every sport. In 2023, a new sports complex was formed. The academics are also the best. The labs are very good, and in Haryana, this college has the best faculty. The study environment is very good. The DH, biochem, and patho labs are all the best.

individual_reviews.course: General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Beauty lies in MAMC, Agroha.

content.Placements: Our college provides us the best placement. It is providing us the best practical experience as we go on duty daily from the last 6 months for about 6 hours. Students who studied in this college get chance to prove themselves in foreign countries like Japan, Australia, Canada, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very well developed, completely representing a professional college with professional labs and classrooms equipped with smart boards. Also, the college has a well-developed wi-fi, and the library here offers us a book section of more than 2000 books, which is enormous.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Appropriate to pursue MBBS. Satisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: Ima MBBS 2020 batch student. I will pass out in year 2025. During period of internship monthly 17k is paid to intern doctor. About 50 percent students got placement. Normally 80-90k package would be offered at time of placement. In Haryana, selection percentage in Post Graduation course is the highest in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facilities are available in academics branch. But it is not available for students it can be accessed by staff only. In hostels no Wi-Fi facility is availed by college authorities students have to purchase Wi-Fi facility personally. Library and reading hall is spacious. Mess food quality is poor but hygiene is maintained properly.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very good college for pursuing medicine. Very cooperative and hardworking teachers.

content.Placements: In medical courses like MBBS the is not anything like placement, In MBBS after completion of course student can opt for higher studies like specialty kr superspecialty. If student don't want to study further the he can be a medical officer or can do his own practice.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is fairly good, has fully AC lecture theraters, Good number of patients visiting the hospital, has examination hall, a central library, all departments has very good practical labs. Hostel are new with all facilities, has indoor games and outdoor games. Mess is very good. All hostels has good water and electricity supply.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college in clinical setup is no less than any AIIMS.

content.Placements: Our college is good. There is a scope in this course and provides good placements after this course. The average salary offered is 1 lakh, after deducting tax it is Rs 87,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and there are many buildings. There are two libraries one is a central library and the other is the paramedical library. The paramedical library is newly formed in our college. Food quality is average in our mess.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. They are always ready to help students, and the course curriculum is relevant. It also makes students industry-ready. Semester exam is beneficial, and they make preparations better and more focused on study.

Maharaja Agrasen Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2024 has been announced for admission to the MBBS course. The institute offers admission to the MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery course based on candidates’ performance in the NEET UG exam. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling rounds for final admission. During the Maharaja Agrasen Medical College 2024 cut off, the last round closing rank for MBBS admission was 15544. The cutoff for the same course was 20625 in 2023 and 21748 in 2022 for admission. So, analysing the cutoff trends over three years, MBBS saw a drop in its last-round closing ranks for the students belonging to the General HS category.

The Round 3 cutoff for admission to the MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery was 15544 for the General HS quota. For the OBC category candidates, the cutoff rank for the same course stood at 27047. reviews.review_heading: The college is the best and good for those who want to become better doctors and help the needful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It has separate grounds for every sport. In 2023, a new sports complex was formed. The academics are also the best. The labs are very good, and in Haryana, this college has the best faculty. The study environment is very good. The DH, biochem, and patho labs are all the best.

reviews.review_heading: Beauty lies in MAMC, Agroha.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very well developed, completely representing a professional college with professional labs and classrooms equipped with smart boards. Also, the college has a well-developed wi-fi, and the library here offers us a book section of more than 2000 books, which is enormous.

reviews.review_heading: Appropriate to pursue MBBS. Satisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are available in academics branch. But it is not available for students it can be accessed by staff only. In hostels no Wi-Fi facility is availed by college authorities students have to purchase Wi-Fi facility personally. Library and reading hall is spacious. Mess food quality is poor but hygiene is maintained properly.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college for pursuing medicine. Very cooperative and hardworking teachers.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is fairly good, has fully AC lecture theraters, Good number of patients visiting the hospital, has examination hall, a central library, all departments has very good practical labs. Hostel are new with all facilities, has indoor games and outdoor games. Mess is very good. All hostels has good water and electricity supply.

reviews.review_heading: This college in clinical setup is no less than any AIIMS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and there are many buildings. There are two libraries one is a central library and the other is the paramedical library. The paramedical library is newly formed in our college. Food quality is average in our mess.

reviews.review_heading: Come to our college to become a doctor.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are average in our college. Mess food qualities are quite good. We have two libraries. Our hospital patient load is excellent enough to learn clinical skills. There is a separate covid buliding. Our campus is full of greenery. It seems like it's on the lap of nature.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good faculty with high OPD numbers.
reviews.review_text:
Our college has provided us with a well-maintained, air-conditioned library. We also have a sports complex that is under construction. There is a food court available for both students and faculty. Wi-Fi is available for college use. Classrooms are of good quality with air conditioners.

The hostel is of average quality. The food available is also average. The canteen gets good food. Medical facilities are open twenty-four hours. An annual sports meet is held for sports recreation.

reviews.review_heading: This college has good atmosphere and provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: It provides well-equipped laboratories, hospital settings, and classrooms for the betterment of students. The classrooms are equipped with projectors and air conditioners. This college provides the facility of well-equipped laboratories for every subject. There are two reading halls for the students. In sports also, there are multiple grounds and areas to promote overall development.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good and provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In this college, a sports complex is making a swimming pool. It provides many classrooms, and laboratories like a blood bank, MRI, CT scan, X-ray, and laparoscopy. Canteen food is also provided. Emergency casualty traum a center for cancer hospitals is provided. It also has a girls' hostel with a shopping complex.

reviews.review_heading: It provides the best faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories and libraries are very good places to study. The hostels are having separate washrooms, and the food is also good. As a hospital patient crowd is good to practice here. They will give students a good package for their services. The food served in the mess is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best Medical colleges in Haryana.
reviews.review_text: Educational infrastructure is good, but the infrastructure for enjoyment is not as good as the sports complex, and the cafeteria is in making that will most probably be completed this year. There is already a football, volleyball, basketball, and cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is a fantastic college with a good campus and hostels.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and campus are very clean and green. The library is air-conditioned. The classrooms are huge, and lecture halls are with air conditioners and projectors. There are grounds for football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, badminton, etc. The mess has a good variety of food for the students. There is a big library to study in.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college, but the hostel is not good.
reviews.review_text: The college is good, but the hostel is not good. Moreover, the condition of washrooms is not good. The mess food is great but it is high. But the food quality is great. Classrooms have air-conditioner, and students also have a central library. It also provides ground for sports.

reviews.review_heading: I'm highly satisfied with the faculty members, facilities, infrastructure and studies provided.
reviews.review_text: There are playgrounds and courts for football, volleyball, badminton and basketball here. The classrooms are equipped with projectors for presentations. Hostels are very good with separate luxurious washrooms for students. Medical facilities are very good as it is one of the best medical institutions in India.

reviews.review_heading: I want to recommend this to all of my friends. Sometimes, homesickness can make things feel weird.
reviews.review_text: Well-maintained classrooms and hostel with good facilities. The food is generally good but sometimes it’s off. Medical facilities are also well-maintained. The internet facility needs improvement. The department is excellent, and I would like to revisit the moment.

reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of a B.A.M.S. college.

review_content.Placements: This college does not provide any placements. This course does not get campus selection. We have to run our own hospital or clinic. This is a medical degree in which one can get a government job, a private job, or set up their own clinic. No placements are done in the best colleges of India.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very good. The labs and departments are well equipped with instruments; they are just loaded with articles. Our library has a vast range of books. The hostel is also well maintained and sanitized. Sanitation and water coolers are also provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is brilliant.

review_content.Placements: In my medical college, there is 99% placement in hospitals. The average package is 6-7 LPA. There are Cipla and others company recruiting. 100% of students get internships in our college. BAMS, BDS, and MSD are the top courses in my college. There are nursing and paramedical colleges too.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice and steady. It is always be updating and good at atmospheric environment. The campus is vast and modern, and it also has a gym and a pool, and look luxury. There are separate washrooms for every department, and there are well-equipped libraries and labs.

review_summary.college_name: Divya Jyoti Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: All the basic information.

content.Placements: This is a medical college, so there are no placements. However, the college does offer rural campaigns for students to gain experience interacting with patients. This is a necessary experience for a medical student. The college also has very good facilities that students need.
content.Infrastructure: The college has all the basic amenities that a student would need, such as large and spacious classrooms, a good library with all the books we need, a college hostel with full security, and a good quality of mess food. All sports grounds are present, and the college is improving its facilities day by day.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of a B.A.M.S. college.

content.Placements: This college does not provide any placements. This course does not get campus selection. We have to run our own hospital or clinic. This is a medical degree in which one can get a government job, a private job, or set up their own clinic. No placements are done in the best colleges of India.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very good. The labs and departments are well equipped with instruments; they are just loaded with articles. Our library has a vast range of books. The hostel is also well maintained and sanitized. Sanitation and water coolers are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is brilliant.

content.Placements: In my medical college, there is 99% placement in hospitals. The average package is 6-7 LPA. There are Cipla and others company recruiting. 100% of students get internships in our college. BAMS, BDS, and MSD are the top courses in my college. There are nursing and paramedical colleges too.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice and steady. It is always be updating and good at atmospheric environment. The campus is vast and modern, and it also has a gym and a pool, and look luxury. There are separate washrooms for every department, and there are well-equipped libraries and labs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A good college in terms of faculty and studies, but an average college in terms of facilities.

content.Placements: With the assistance of Shikha.com, I was able to gain admission to Divyajyoti Medical College via an entrance exam known as NEET. It is a 5.5-year learning programme called B.A.M.S. in which a year-long internship is included. with a starting salary of Rs 20–30k. After completion, you can work in any Pancharama centre as a lab technician, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent, with amenities such as 24-hour Wi-Fi in the college and hostel. Food quality is pretty good, so you can easily adapt to the environment. Seniors are really helpful and polite. Medical facilities are also a good advantage to rate this college, plus sports are amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure and facilities. It is good in academics.

review_content.Placements: Our college is a medical college, and we do not get placements in companies like engineering colleges. But the number of students who are getting PG courses in M.B.S from our college is much higher than the other M.B.B.S colleges. The education quality is also good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college lecture hall has central air conditioning facilities and is large enough to accommodate more than 200 students. We have a well-equipped library and study hall, and they have a peaceful environment. Every year, they conduct a sports day, and it lasts for a week. The quality of the food is good, but the hostel fee is quite higher than other colleges and somewhat strict.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It has a good infrastructure, but it needs some areas of refinement.

review_content.Placements: In 2014 batch, we were 148 students. Yearly passing percentage is always above 94%. In the final year, our batch pass percentage was 99.25%, and 145 students entered into CRRI internship. Course fees are also increasing steadily year by year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was above standards. Lecture halls are fully air-conditioned, and labs are equipped with good quality instruments. The library has all collections of books, but it is not working 24 hours. A separate reading room was available where you can read your own books. Hotel infrastructure was good, but the fees are high. Mess food was not that good according to fees.

review_summary.college_name: Velammal Medical College Hospital and Research Institute Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and facilities. It is good in academics.

content.Placements: Our college is a medical college, and we do not get placements in companies like engineering colleges. But the number of students who are getting PG courses in M.B.S from our college is much higher than the other M.B.B.S colleges. The education quality is also good.
content.Infrastructure: Our college lecture hall has central air conditioning facilities and is large enough to accommodate more than 200 students. We have a well-equipped library and study hall, and they have a peaceful environment. Every year, they conduct a sports day, and it lasts for a week. The quality of the food is good, but the hostel fee is quite higher than other colleges and somewhat strict.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It has a good infrastructure, but it needs some areas of refinement.

content.Placements: In 2014 batch, we were 148 students. Yearly passing percentage is always above 94%. In the final year, our batch pass percentage was 99.25%, and 145 students entered into CRRI internship. Course fees are also increasing steadily year by year.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was above standards. Lecture halls are fully air-conditioned, and labs are equipped with good quality instruments. The library has all collections of books, but it is not working 24 hours. A separate reading room was available where you can read your own books. Hotel infrastructure was good, but the fees are high. Mess food was not that good according to fees.

review_content.Placements: I completed my graduation in B.Sc. CS from this college in the year 2019. Talking about the placements of this college, no one from my batch got placed as this college didn't offer placements for B.Sc. or B.Com graduates. However, if you are doing B.E. or B.Tech from this college, you can get some decent placements. The highest package offered by companies was 11 LPA, and the average package was 2.5 LPA. review_summary.college_name: Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences (SSSUTMS) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in 2024.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 5 LPA, the lowest was 1 LPA, and the average was 2.5 LPA. Companies like Cipla, Mankind, etc. Many companies gave placements to students from lower college students, and the highest placement was given to M Pharmacy students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available were good management. Classrooms were very good, and the library was amazing, having all the course books available. There were no sports or games in the lower college. The mess and canteen had outstanding quality food, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The faculty is great, but students are not as much as the campus provides.

content.Placements: There is no such news of placement in SSSUTMS. During my 2 years of college, I haven't heard about any placement in my Aeronautical department. Otherwise, there might be placements that might have happened in the computer science department. Once, there was a notice issue about an industrial visit, but it never happened.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at SSSUTMS is average. Students do not have university emails, nor is Wi-Fi provided for them. Wi-Fi is only available for staff. There is Wi-Fi by Jio, but it has limited data. The computer labs on campus are sufficient for teaching and are in an okay state. The library has all the books required in the curriculum, and you can also find extra reference books. The hostel is somewhat poor. I do not stay in the hostel, but my friends say the food is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied.

content.Placements: Our college has no placements; not a single company visited. According to previous records, the staff says the average package was 10 LPA, but there was not a single placement in my session.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and a green environment. I cannot say much about the hostel because I did not live there. Canteen food was good, but there is no playground for sports activities.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful. They have a very old course curriculum, and the university does not update it. The passing percentage is good, but I do not know how students pass because the teachers are not interested in teaching.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by SSSUTMS for admission to B.A.M.S.?
faqs.answer: The main entrance exam accepted is the *NEET*, which stands for National Eligibility cum Entrance Test for the admission to the B.A.M.S. programme in SSSUTMS. It is a common entrance conducted by National Testing Agency across India for B.A.M.S. programs in the private and government institutions in the country.A qualifying score in NEET is required for admission since it is a statutory requirement for medical and allied health Science courses. Then, the admission is based on counseling and cutoffs as per the NEET score and availability of seats.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available were good management. Classrooms were very good, and the library was amazing, having all the course books available. There were no sports or games in the lower college. The mess and canteen had outstanding quality food, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is great, but students are not as much as the campus provides.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at SSSUTMS is average. Students do not have university emails, nor is Wi-Fi provided for them. Wi-Fi is only available for staff. There is Wi-Fi by Jio, but it has limited data. The computer labs on campus are sufficient for teaching and are in an okay state. The library has all the books required in the curriculum, and you can also find extra reference books. The hostel is somewhat poor. I do not stay in the hostel, but my friends say the food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college dissatisfy.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are there along with lab and infrastructure. But library is very cheap and third class. There are no seats and books in it. Also mess food is very dirty. Bed of hostel is not clean and bathroom is very dirty. The hostel boys are in trouble many times with this college. Because the college does not order the hostel guard to take specific care of cleaning and mess food. Hostel is connected to the college.

reviews.review_heading: SSUTMS, Bhopal Review by Prajwal Pawar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department was decent; it was vast and the environment was also quite decent. There were all kinds of labs like the computer lab, chemistry lab, and others. Talking about the hostel facility, it was also decent, and the quality of food was acceptable. There were separate girls' and boys' hostels in this college, and the fee was around 12,000 for a year.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and a green environment. I cannot say much about the hostel because I did not live there. Canteen food was good, but there is no playground for sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus and studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good and the hostel is great. We had to go to the labs and library every day which was a good experience. The hostel was very comfortable and all the students had a great time. The sports days were especially memorable.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The course was very good. Facilities and infrastructure were good in the pharmacy department. Wi-Fi facility was available. Classrooms were the best and a useful library was available. Canteen food was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college plays a vital role in the development as the students were now focusing on the laboratories, classrooms, etc., while selecting a college. Computing resources were one of the important and mandatory needs of this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very good infrastructure, staff, teachers, canteen and playground.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. They also provide good quality facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, hostels, mess, canteen, medical, and playground. Our college also organises many sports events, quiz types competitions and many entertaining occasions.

reviews.review_heading: There are good faculty members in this college.
reviews.review_text: Both boys and girls hostels are available in our college. Our college also has public Wi-Fi facility and all subjects labs. A hospital is available for medical facilities, and games and sports are organised here. Apart from this, many faculty members from outside the college visit our college for expert lectures.

reviews.review_heading: Stay away unless you don't love your career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is of top-class undoubtedly. But there is no benefit of having a good infrastructure if college is not offering quality education. There are good labs and classrooms, but they are of no use if they are not providing quality education. Stay away from this college.

reviews.review_heading: Never choose for engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are several buildings, and there is a space for games like football and cricket. They have huge infrastructure and a lot of open spaces for playground and canteen. It's close to Pachama railway station and further connected to Sehore-Bhopal road. The infrastructure is in good condition, and it has an awesome location, and it is a cool place.

reviews.review_heading: Good management and also pharmacy departments are good.
reviews.review_text: Good in infrastructure but amenities cleanliness are not up to date. Higher tier grasses are grown in the garden areas. Water is not available in the summer due to this classes of hostel student are mostly absent. The college management is not working for the student but working for their self.

reviews.review_heading: An infrastructure oriented college with generous faculty.
reviews.review_text: This college is only concentrating on its infrastructure, but not on the environment-friendly infrastructure. It just contains the buildings. They do not have a good canteen although remaining things are nice and infrastructure is also fine.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences (SSSUTMS).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is world-class. Classrooms would be empty after 1st semester due to the unavailability of faculty members. The hostel facility is available. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are not applicable, and you would not get any help here if you like sports. Labs are not available.

overview_faqs.answer: The scope of microbiology is huge because of the involvement of microbiology in various fields such as Pharmacy, Medicine, clinical research, agriculture, dairy industry, water industry, nanotechnology & chemical technology. A person who specialises in this field is called a Microbiologist. Some of the Jobs in this field are mentioned below -1. Biomedical scientist2. Bio technologist3. Clinical research associate4. Food technologist5. Healthcare scientist, immunology6. Medicinal chemist7. Microbiologist8. Nano technologist.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the MGM Medical College And Hospital, Jamshedpur:

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied as it is a government medical college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 100% of students are placed. It's a course for 5 years, including internships. After completing the MBBS course offered to their rank, one can prepare for the PG exam for further courses such as MD or MS. They can continue with the MBBS degree but most students take PG exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good. The water supply is occasionally disrupted. Our classrooms are good. More than 100 students can be accommodated, as the batch strength is 100 every year. The library and cafeteria are good. The mess food is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It has good faculty members, best placements but a below-average infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Almost all doctors got placed. There are vacancies almost everywhere, maybe in the city or outside the city. The city hospitals are Tata Main Hospital, Jamshedpur, Apex Hospital Jamshedpur, RIMS Ranchi and any large or small health care facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are below average, but teachers exceed expectations. They manage their way out in teaching as they are highly skilled. Food quality is good, but it is not amazing. However, due to ongoing construction, the playground is lost, so there are no sports for a few years.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the fastest and best growing medical colleges.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very impressive. Almost every student who opted for placements got it with a good salary. The average salary offered was somewhat higher than Rs. 60,000 per month. Our seniors got placements in very reputed hospitals, while some opted for higher studies and got very good ranks.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is poor, the campus is bad almost no campus everything is very congested.

content.Placements: Graduates usually apply for postgraduate and once they are selected they get a stipend depending on what college they enroll in. Government jobs are also an option that usually pays Rs. 60,000-Rs. 90,000. Teaching is also an option for the graduates some of them go for research.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is poor. There is no Wi-Fi. Classrooms are also falling apart. The hostel is very old. These are no new buildings 4-to 5 students are living in a single room. The hostel building is breaking down. All the walls have cracked. Rooms are not sufficient to accommodate these many students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with the campus, but it's a government college, so it's worth it.

content.Placements: There are 100 seats available for admission to our course. Admission takes place through the NEET UG examination. A student must do a paid internship for a year. Students can choose different branches depending on their ranks after completing the course.
content.Infrastructure: It is a 60-year-old college. Our college does not provide good infrastructure. New residential areas are well-equipped. A library is available. The quality of the food is average. A cafeteria is available.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are good. Some subject teachers are average. They are helpful. The teaching quality is good. Three internal exams and a final exam take place. Exams are good. You can pass them by going through the previous year's papers.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is poor, the campus is bad almost no campus everything is very congested.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor. There is no Wi-Fi. Classrooms are also falling apart. The hostel is very old. These are no new buildings 4-to 5 students are living in a single room. The hostel building is breaking down. All the walls have cracked. Rooms are not sufficient to accommodate these many students.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the campus, but it's a government college, so it's worth it.
reviews.review_text: It is a 60-year-old college. Our college does not provide good infrastructure. New residential areas are well-equipped. A library is available. The quality of the food is average. A cafeteria is available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied as it is a government medical college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good. The water supply is occasionally disrupted. Our classrooms are good. More than 100 students can be accommodated, as the batch strength is 100 every year. The library and cafeteria are good. The mess food is good.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members, best placements but a below-average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are below average, but teachers exceed expectations. They manage their way out in teaching as they are highly skilled. Food quality is good, but it is not amazing. However, due to ongoing construction, the playground is lost, so there are no sports for a few years.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the fastest and best growing medical colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hospital is average here. However, the new hospital complex, which is under construction, will be having top-notch infrastructure and equipment. The new hospital complex will be ready within one to two years. The infrastructure of hostels is good, and the college infrastructure is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in the country.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is moderate in the hospital, but the new hospital complex will be ready in one to two years, and it will have top-notch infrastructure and equipment. Hostels are well maintained and so is the college. The course is also designed very properly.

reviews.review_heading: Our college lacks something, but it provides many good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college, hospital and hostel need improvement according to the current needs of students. Even the college management is working on it, and the development of new infrastructure is in progress at a very fast rate. The new infrastructure would be ready soon.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and I am satisfied with its facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, and the library is well-equipped. Hostel facilities and environment are good enough to survive peacefully. The mess is good, and the quality of food is satisfactory. Our college also provides a Wi-Fi facility. It does not provide sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. It has all the facilities for students to become good a doctor of our society.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides a Wi-Fi facility both in the hostel as well as in college. The library is good. Classrooms are inbuilt with new technology with a fully air-conditioned facility. The hostel provides good facilities, and it is equipped with an RO machine. In the hostel, the studying room is fully air-conditioned, and it is the best place to keep away from distraction and focus on study.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent enough to make good and educated doctors.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on our campus. Our library is one of the best among many medical colleges. The infrastructure of laboratories can be improved. They should be updated with a proper provision of all the chemical and medical equipment. There is a major requirement to improve the cleanliness in the girls' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place, and it provides good facilities for studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is medium to the worst quality. Hostels have the worst quality, and they do have any sports facilities. The food served is adjustable, and hygiene is not maintained. Students themselves control everything, and the warden will not come in front to look at what is happening in the hostel. But it is a good place.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for MBBS course.
reviews.review_text: Some buildings are quite old but are still in good condition. New hostels and hospitals are being constructed near the college. There are huge classrooms and labs available for students. We have a library with a good number of books. Playground for sports and games is available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college, and I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available. Labs are in good condition with all the required lab apparatus and instruments. The classrooms and lecture theatres are in good condition and spacious. The library is very good, spacious and has all kinds of books required for the students. It has an excellent collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the medical field.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are high-tech and well-illuminated. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, air-conditioning, library, hostel and mess. The library is huge, and it has all editions of books. The hostel facility is good, but the quality of food served is average. It does not provide sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college, and it is good.
reviews.review_text: The library is very good here. The hostel and academic facilities are up to the mark. The lodging and residential development are very well. Still, the construction work is in progress in our college which will improve the facilities in our college.

After finishing their internship, students can work as medical offices in a government hospital or as a junior president in a private hospital. It depends on what a student's future plans are.

paragraphs: Sri Siddhartha Institute of Medical Science and Research Center admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences and Nursing.Sri Siddhartha Institute of Medical Science and Research Centeradmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNEET, NEET PG, and KCET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 85,32,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 66 months - 4 years.

paragraphs: Techno India University Powered by Emversity has a Placement Team that ensures placement assistance to every student. The placement team supports the students with personalized resumes and interview skills like Personality Development, Interpersonal and Communication Skills, and other Interview techniques. The team also conducts on-campus placement drives and organises a wide range of activities such as industry visits, workshops, consultations, and guest lectures.

Recently, Techno India University Powered by Emversity has concluded the placements for the Class of 2024 with 89% placement rate . As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Techno India University Powered by Emversity placements 2024 stood at INR 2 Crore per annum and INR 11 LPA, respectively. More than 250 recruiters visited the Techno India University Powered by Emversity campus for 2024 placements and offered 28,000 job offers to the students of the batch 2024. The top recruiters of Techno India University Powered by Emversity in 2024 included Pathkind Labs, Oasis Fertility, Orange Health Labs, Accord Superspeciality Hospital, Fortis, Bilva Hospitals, Metro Heart Institute, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college and one of the best to learn and be the expert.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students start their dental clinic so I don't have an idea of placements from our college. Teachers here train you in a good way to be experts and get picked by various medical institutions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is excellent. Students are provided a good environment to study and relax. There has never been any single issue regarding infrastructure and other facilities.
review_content.Faculty: We are trained by highly qualified teachers who are experts in their respective streams. Each student is taken care of with his/her studies and teachers make sure that they go through the problems of every individual. The course curriculum is relevant and awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good, but not the best. It is good enough in an affordable fee range.

review_content.Placements: It is not the best college in the country as patient inflow is low, but it is better than many colleges. There are no placements, but students who pass out are doing well enough in their lives. The college provides internships to all the students. The college also provides MS courses as it has an affiliation with AIIMS Rishikesh.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good with fully air-conditioned college and hospital block. Our college provides a huge lecture hall with smart learning programs. There is a good capacity department labs with proper equipment and assistance. The hostel rooms are very good with attached washrooms. The hostel rooms are good enough to occupy only two students. Gymnasium, basketball court, badminton courts and swimming pool facility is also available here.

overview_faqs.question: Is Seema Dental College and Hospital a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Seema Dental College and Hospital is a well-known institution for BDS, MDS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Seema Dental College and Hospital has a rating of 3.6 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 3.2 on placements, 4 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Seema Dental College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure and facilities. The equipment is a little old but workable.

content.Placements: There are no placements offered through the college as it is a dental college. There is a compulsory 1-year internship provided by the college, and a 1500-rupee stipend is given to the interns every month. However, the passed-out students can apply to work at the college or hospital as staff.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are labs for every subject, but the facilities are old. The lecture halls have AC and are soundproof, but the mics don't work properly. The Wi-Fi is available but with very poor service. The hostel facilities are good, and AC is available. The mess food is okay only; the quality is not that good. Canteen food is great, though. A medical dispensary is available for hostellers. Volleyball, basketball, and badminton courts are available, and a swimming pool is also there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A good college for hard workers.

content.Placements: We have a batch of 90 students and the college in total has seat available for 100 students. There are no placement offered after the course is done and we have to look and decide for ourselves regarding what to do after finishing BDS. Internship is provided after 4 year course and no extra fee is to be submitted for it. The students can apply for externship in other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well ventilated with comfortable study environment. One projector screen and one green board is provided in each lecture hall. All the lecture halls are spacious. As for the hostel rooms it is spacious enough for two people and the house maintenance staff is good and works in a timely manner. Mess food is good and those who are not picky eaters will be happy with the food provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college and one of the best to learn and be the expert.

content.Placements: Most of the students start their dental clinic so I don't have an idea of placements from our college. Teachers here train you in a good way to be experts and get picked by various medical institutions.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is excellent. Students are provided a good environment to study and relax. There has never been any single issue regarding infrastructure and other facilities.
content.Faculty: We are trained by highly qualified teachers who are experts in their respective streams. Each student is taken care of with his/her studies and teachers make sure that they go through the problems of every individual. The course curriculum is relevant and awesome.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good, but not the best. It is good enough in an affordable fee range.

content.Placements: It is not the best college in the country as patient inflow is low, but it is better than many colleges. There are no placements, but students who pass out are doing well enough in their lives. The college provides internships to all the students. The college also provides MS courses as it has an affiliation with AIIMS Rishikesh.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good with fully air-conditioned college and hospital block. Our college provides a huge lecture hall with smart learning programs. There is a good capacity department labs with proper equipment and assistance. The hostel rooms are very good with attached washrooms. The hostel rooms are good enough to occupy only two students. Gymnasium, basketball court, badminton courts and swimming pool facility is also available here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is not a great place because of insufficient patients inflow in the hospital.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of the students get placed from every batch from our college. Our college also provides 100% internships in hospitals. You can open your own clinics and pursue higher degrees. MS courses are offered, and our college has a collaboration with All India Institute of Medical Science Rishikesh.
content.Infrastructure: There are well-facilitated lecture halls and highly functional laboratories. There is a playground, along with a basketball court. The mess serves good quality food, and there is a canteen with proper services. Our college has an auditorium for cultural events and two hostel buildings where there are double sharing rooms.

Wi-Fi in the whole campus, and it is too good, 24/7 working. The library is always there for us, enough classrooms, and the CCTV system is also good. All the labs that are necessary in the MBBS course are available in our college. The facilities are too good, I'm getting everything more than I expected. The quality of food is much better. description: AIIMS, Guwahati cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS, Guwahati NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 7686 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS, Guwahati MBBS cutoff 2025 was 7686 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 14953 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS, Guwahati accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
AIIMS, Guwahati INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 793 to 23959 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology, with a lowest cutoff rank of 793. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Physiology, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology, MD in ENT and MS in Ophthalmology, with Round 3 closing ranks of 793, 810 and 967, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.
AIIMS, Guwahati B.Sc. cutoff 2025 was 2059 in the last round. In 2024, the last round closing rank for the same course was 2156 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
For the OBC category students, the AIIMS Nursing cutoff 2025 for the B.Sc. course was 3795 in the last round. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering freshers in India depends on a lot of factors like academic record, skill set, internship experience, company location, etc. Initially, you can get approximately INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA after completing the BTech Petroleum Engg. course. As you earn a few years of experience in the field, you can easily earn between INR 6 LPA and INR 10 LPA at the mid-senior level. For senior-level positions, the salary can go up to INR 15 LPA. Recruiters pay more to people who have the right set of skills and experience and help in their business growth.Know more about -Petroleum Engineering Courses

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college of Gulbarga.

content.Placements: Any student who has passed in PUC or Diploma can join this university; no percentage is fixed. There are no placement facilities in this university, and no companies are hiring from this university because they don't provide placements to students. The placements are poor.
content.Infrastructure: The university has hostels for boys and girls, but the boys' hostel has a decent building, and the girls' hostel has a great building. In the boys' hostel, they don't have proper washrooms, and the cost of the hostel food is average, but good quality food is provided by the university.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities but not satisfied by faculty.

content.Placements: There are no placement programs or offers from the college for students yet. The campus is on-going vast development and we hope it also provides placement facilities in the upcoming years.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Khaja Bandanawaz University is absolutely mind-blowing. The university campus is spread over 50 acres of land. It has a gym and a garden for relaxation. The campus is very cold because of the huge trees. The classrooms are also very good.
content.Faculty: The teachers at this college are very knowledgeable and helpful. They are qualified doctors, and the teaching quality is above average. The semester exams are easy to difficult based on the learner, and the pass percentage is 85-90%.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

hostel_campus.college_name: Khaja Bandanawaz University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Best college of Gulbarga.
reviews.review_text: The university has hostels for boys and girls, but the boys' hostel has a decent building, and the girls' hostel has a great building. In the boys' hostel, they don't have proper washrooms, and the cost of the hostel food is average, but good quality food is provided by the university.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities but not satisfied by faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Khaja Bandanawaz University is absolutely mind-blowing. The university campus is spread over 50 acres of land. It has a gym and a garden for relaxation. The campus is very cold because of the huge trees. The classrooms are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much dissatisfied .
reviews.review_text: We have the best classrooms with the best infrastructure. We have different labs with all the facilities, like computers and hardware parts. In college, every year there will be sports events organized by the management and we have an open area for basketball, cricket, football and all. We also have canteen but there will be only drinks and some snacks, not dal and price. I hope it will be on the on the menu.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a green campus with great teachers, but the hostel needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is a waste. There are no basic amenities in the hostel. But apart for the hostel, the campus is very beautiful and full of greenery. There is no Wi-Fi. The canteen is average having less items on the menu. Good medical facilities are available while the sports activities are still developing. Games are held every year on a university level.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by the faculty of teaching and hostel.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good library, but they have old edition of the books. And they do not provide the students with the books. Hostel is very good, with clean and hygiene maintenance. Food is excellent with hygiene. They provide you with tea three time in a day. Breakfast is made early and served.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent to get a degree.
reviews.review_text: The college has very poor infrastructure. The road is bad for a long time. Currently, it is getting renovated after becoming an autonomous college. The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility. The library is old. In the classrooms, there are pigeons. There is no proper parking area.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Khaja Banda Nawaz College of Engineering, Gulbarga.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average, and it could be good enough as it becomes a university now. It should have good infrastructure, but it is average for now. The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility and labs. Central and department library is available for the students. It provides a paid hostel facility for students. Mess and canteen are available. Games facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Kbn university absolutely good faculty of biotechnology in 2023.
reviews.review_text:
-Everything is available Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms. Classrooms are good
Wi-Fi is available always
Labs are good and some instruments are not there
-There is no hostel facility
May be now they will provide hostel facility 
During our time there was no hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study in but not for enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi hotspot is enabled in the college for college students for coding and much more. Many las are available for courses like Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science, electronics and electricals. Library is also available in the college. Students do not eat in canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is surrounded by lush greenery. Our labs are good. The library is good. The canteen is available. The gym is good. Sports are played every week, and many sports events are organised.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available in our college. The infrastructure of our college is not good. Our college has a good library where students can study without any disturbance. Many books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: There is no campus placements .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the engineering college is quite below average, buildings are more than 30 years old and the roads to the departments are just even wrost. The library, laboratories, and classrooms are big. The hostel is average. The canteen is good. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the environment.
reviews.review_text:
College have Wi-Fi and well structured and well experienced staff and there is an average classrooms and library is large and well maintained.
Hostel is good and mess food needs to be improved and canteen food is better.
There is medical facilities available in college .

reviews.review_heading: Our college and faculty members are excellent, and they provide all the things.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was superb, and the food was excellent. Warden sir was good. The library was very good, and many books were available. Quality of food was excellent, and they provide different weekly varieties. There is nothing to worry about food. Rooms were excellent, and the total infrastructure was also good.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive environment, great infrastructure, but no placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure with excellent lab and classroom facilities and strong Wi-Fi. However, the library lacks proper books and access. There's no hostel for engineering students. The canteen food is good, and the college provides great sports facilities.
