admission_overview.college_name: Krishna Group of Institutions Kanpur Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Eligibility, Application

admission_process.title: Krishna Group Of Institutions, Kanpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Krishna Group of Institutions admission 2025is currently open. The institution offers multiple courses, such as BTech, BPharma, MSc, etc., at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institution also offers UG Diploma, MSc, GNM and DPharma courses. To get admission toKrishna Group of Institutions, candidates will be selected based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Moreover, the institute is affiliated withAKTU,BTE, UPSMF, andABVMU. The application process at KGI is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutKrishna Group of Institutions' course admission2025.

KGIoffers more than 20 courses in various streams such as Pharmacy, Engineering, Nursing, etc. The mode of study atKrishna Group of Institutionsis full-time. Krishna Group of Institutions is affiliated with AKTU and ABVMU. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete graduation or Class 12 as per the respective courses for the selection process. The institute is also known as KGI, Kanpur. Krishna Group of Institutions, Kanpur has sub-institutes under its ambit:Krishna Institute of Technology(KIOT),Krishna Institute of Pharmacy & Sciences(KIPS), andKrishna Institute of Nursing Science & Research(KINSR). Check out the following table for details aboutKGIcourse admissions2025:
Particulars
Krishna Group of Institutions Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Level of programmes offered

KGI course admissionsare primarily merit-based. Students need to satisfy the minimum educational qualification. The institute may conduct further selection rounds if it deems it necessary. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The eligibility criteria may vary slightly depending on various factors. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularKrishna Group of Institution courses:

Krishna Group of Institutions' admission processincludes registration and entrance exam scores as per the respective courses. Students looking to enrol on any of the offered courses are required to complete the multi-step procedure of admission. The application process for the institute is carried out online. Interested students can follow the step-by-stepKrishna Group of Institutions admission processexplained below:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested students can apply online at the official website of the institute. Students must complete the entire application process, which includes filling out the application form, uploading the required documents, and paying the application fees. However, aspirants also have to meet the eligibility criteria mentioned in the table presented above.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Students are mainly shortlisted based on academic performance in the last qualifying exam. It is mandatory that aspirants meet the preset admission criteria, as failure to do so would result in cancellation of candidature.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theKrishna Group of Institutions feeto confirm their seats at the university.
KGI Eligibility Criteria

reviews.review_heading: Excellent placement opportunities and modern.
reviews.review_text: Course infrastructure is good. State-of-the-art classrooms are equipped with modern technology such as projectors screens audio systems. There are online learning platforms, utilizing digital tools for remote learning discussion forums, and resource sharing. Hostel infrastructure is good. There are comfortable accommodations and spacious rooms with essential amenities such as beds, desks, and storage.

reviews.review_heading: The best college you can invest for your future.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure with greenery, well-maintained cleanliness, and there are lots of flowers. Facilities such as a hostel for both boys and girls, with delicious mess food available. There are smart classrooms and a smart computer lab. All the labs are well-maintained. The library has knowledgeable books. The newly made canteen is so beautiful, and the food tastes amazing. Sports events are also held for students to enjoy games both indoors and outdoors are held and is fun.

reviews.review_heading: Joining Krishna Institute, Pharmacy and Sciences was a turning point in my life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good and the food is so good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good campus environment.
reviews.review_text: The campus is clean and green and equipped with a digital lab, a well-stocked library, and good classroom facilities. Free Wi-Fi in classrooms and computer labs. Digital learning makes studying more effective and accessible. Sports are conducted every week, overall good food quality.

reviews.review_heading: KGI is the best for students.
reviews.review_text: The campus is clean, green, and equipped with modern labs a well-stocked library, and good classroom facilities. The Wi-Fi-enabled campus and digital learning tools make studying more effective and accessible. The laboratories are well-equipped with modern instruments and the library house a comprehensive collection of pharmaceutical tests and journals.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty is very helpful to the students and always stands to support me.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is clean, well-maintained, and free from pets. The food in the mess or canteen nutrition, diverse and of food quality. The hostel is secure with security measures like guards and CCTV cameras. The room condition of my college is well clean and maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Education is the best in college. Faculty members and facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is well-cleaned, green, and equipped with modern labs. There is a well-stocked library and good classroom facilities. The design of the college is very nice, with airy classrooms, a big playground, and an open-air theatre. It is located in the best area. The hospital and theatre are near the college.

reviews.review_heading: A transformative journey at Krishna Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The campus is modern, well-maintained, and provides ample resources for students to excel. Laboratories are well-equipped with modern instruments. Library houses a comprehensive collection of pharmaceutical texts and journals. Our college has smart classrooms, Wi-Fi connections, and digital resources further enhance the learning experience.

reviews.review_heading: Krishna Group: Building the future with excellence.
reviews.review_text: The campus is clean, green, and equipped with modern labs, a well-stocked library, and good classroom facilities. The Wi-Fi-enabled campus and digital learning tools make studying more effective and accessible. Krishna Group of Institutions offers state of the art infrastructure that supports both learning and research.  The pharmacy department is well-equipped with modern labs.

reviews.review_heading: I had the opportunity to experience the KGI campus, it is an amazing place to learn and grow.
reviews.review_text: Labs were equipped with the latest hardware and software, allowing students to work on projects and assignments. The library is well-stocked and provides access to a vast collection of books, journals, and online resources. The Wi-Fi speed is high. The food in the canteen is good and many sports and games were organized on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: KGI provides strong placements and a holistic environment.
reviews.review_text: Krishna Group of Institutions offers one of the best infrastructure with modern lecture halls, well-equipped labs, and one of the best libraries. It truly feels like a home away from home. The campus is clean green, and beautifully maintained. The hostels are top-notch.

reviews.review_heading: Good and affordable college for students. A bus facility is also there.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is worth the fee structure. Hostels are safe for both girls and boys. There is also a gym inside the hostel and library. The mess has every facility. The food of the mess is different on every single day of the week. Snack hours are different. Saturday is considered as a games day. Many indoor and outdoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: About the college: KGI Kanpur .
reviews.review_text: The campus has Wi-Fi connectivity, and labs are also well-maintained, and computer labs are very well-maintained. The library is also well-equipped and maintained. All average facilities are available in this college, and sports programs happen.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are very good. Our college has many labs like an electrical lab, a chemistry lab, etc. It has workshops. The hostel rooms are very good. The hostel has 24X7 electricity and free Wi-Fi. The mess provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: Very good facilities and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Kiot hostel is very good and has very good facilities such as, 24 hours light and free Wi-Fi. Rooms are also clean and also a gym is available in the hostel. Students also play cricket and volleyball in regular basis.

Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Rangaraya Medical College, Kakinada boasts an impressive review rating of 4.08 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.67 for Campus Life, 4.17 for Placements, 4.24 for Faculty, and 3.55 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Rangaraya Medical College, Kakinada Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good academics and culturals.

content.Placements: Our college provides nice placements. Very nice placements were allowed for students. There were awesome internship facilities in which the students had pre-exposure before doing their PG and stood in any emergencies in the casualty, and also knew how to deal with patients.
content.Faculty: Papers were good. The paper standards were high quality, and those papers were very difficult but improved better knowledge. In the standards, the papers were given by the top faculty members. Professors set papers to high standards that the students should know. Best faculty members I have ever seen. Faculty members interacted with every student in class and made sure of every student. The students were also very interested. They show respect and curiosity towards subjects taught by lecturers and professors in the class.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is very well sophisticated and built in a very beautiful city.

content.Placements: All the students who have passed their final year will do an internship at the government general hospital in Kakinada. After completion of the internship, they'll get their degree. There is an 80% pass rate at Rangaraya Medical College. Since this is a government college there is good exposure to clinics.
content.Infrastructure: Classes take place in the gallery. There are separate galleries for most of the subjects. They are well-equipped with air conditioning. They are well-cleaned. All subjects have their labs and their own equipment. There are two libraries one digital and another central library. The quality of food at the mess is okay. The college provides sports like cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, tennis, badminton, and table tennis courts.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied. Our college is known for discipline, hard work, and best results.

content.Placements: A maximum number of students try to join MBBS in RMC, like in internships. They get a Rs. 30,000 per month stipend and all postgraduates probably even more. Governor Hospital is there for learning skills. All 4th year passed out get to go to the internship for sure.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is so good at the college. We have two campuses one at the main building and the other at the hospital, both the campus have libraries and are peaceful and all. Wi-Fi is also available. The hostel food is okay but the accommodation is good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of my college as a student.

content.Placements: In my course, there are 250 students placed per batch. Internship is compulsory for all medical students in this course. The final step for completion of this course is through the internship, after which a certificate is issued. The placement is through the NEET PG exam, which you must crack to enter into postgraduate studies.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty members are highly qualified and well educated. There are many libraries on the campus, like a digital library and a central library, which make it easy for students to study. The quality of the hostel mess is good. As it's a medical college, all the necessary medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: All about Rangaraya Medical College, the 2nd top medical college in Andhra Pradesh.

content.Placements: The MBBS course doesn't provide placements at any college. RMC provides internship opportunities in the government general hospital, Kakinada, associated with it. During the period of the internship, the management stipends the students with an average amount of 20k to 25k.
content.Infrastructure: The college is so peaceful, with greenery around. It provides various galleries (large classrooms with a higher number of students), labs, and libraries with Wi-Fi access. There are specific galleries for every department and 3 libraries with well-maintained air conditioning and access to the e-library.

college_info.intro:
K.M. University popular programmes are BSc and BTech. BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Data Scientists, and Data Analysts, or can take various job opportunities relevant to their field. K.M. University in Mathura aims to create diverse, market-driven, and interdisciplinary post-graduate and undergraduate programmes that can combine quality with affordability. Mathura K.M. University is visited by top companies such as Capgemini, Tata Consultancy Services, Infosys, and others.
K.M. University BSc students can work as Psychologists, Psychotherapists, Counsellors, or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their stream. Overall, K.M. University Mathura Uttar Pradesh is one of the best universities present in India for Medical Science Education. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by K.M. University and their respective eligibility and K.M. University fees:

faqs.answer: A:    K.M. University, based in Mathura, Uttar Pradesh, provides a variety of undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. The cost of studying at K.M. University varies by course. Tuition rates for undergraduate programmes typically range between INR 20,000 and INR 4 Lacs per year, with postgraduate programmes costing significantly more. Additional costs, such as hostel lodging, exam fees, and other miscellaneous expenses, should be addressed. For accurate and up-to-date information, check the official K.M. University website or contact the admissions office directly.
faqs.question: How costly is it to study at K.M. University?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for the BTech programme at K.M. University is inclusive of admission fees, caution deposits, examination fees, and many other charges for facilities provided by the university during the programme. The total tuition fee collated for the BTech programme at Assam University is taken from unofficial sources. Hence, it is indicative. The total tuition fee for the BTech programme at K.M. admission_process.title: K.M. University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: K.M University admission 2025 (form)is currently open. The university offers courses, such as BSc, BPT, MSc, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD and diploma courses. To get admitted to K.M. University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The college offers more than 30 courses (including specialisations). The application process atK.M Universityis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutK.M Universitycourse admission2025.
K.M. University admission 2025is merit-based. The mode of study for various courses is full-time. Check out the following table for details aroundK.M Universitycourse admissions2025:
Particulars

Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?

K.M. University courses' admissions are based on merit. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularK.M. University courses:

K.M. University's admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation as per last educational qualification except for MBA course. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in KM University:
STEP 1: K.M. University Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students are selected based on merit for various courses. Apart from this, candidates also have to complete the last educational qualification set by the college.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for B.Tech admission at K.M. University?
faqs.answer: For admission in a BTech programme at K.M. University, it is crucial that the aspirant fulfills the course-specific eligibility criteria. Thus, only the asiprants who have passed Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate are eligible for admission. In addition, student should have passed the qualifying examination from a recognised board. Candidate must also hold the Class 12 mark sheet during application form filling and at the time of admission for verification purposes.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted for admission to an MBA programme at K.M. University?
faqs.answer: For admission to K.M. University, the entrance exam scores for MBA courses are based on national-level exam scores. For MBA courses, candidates must have a valid score of CAT/MAT/XMAT/NMAT with good scores. Apart from this, candidates must pass a Bachelor's degree with a 50% aggregate.

faqs.question: How difficult is it to get admission to B.Sc at K.M. University?
faqs.answer: It is fairly easy to get admission to BSc courses at K.M. University. Moroever, the candidate must have studiedPhysics, Chemistry, and Maths or Biologyas mandatory subjects in Class 12. For candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC, physically challenged, and other such categories, theminimum percentage required is 45. Next, the selection is made based on JEE Main scores.

college_info.college_name: Doon P.G. Paramedical College and Hospital

highlights.summary: The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for Doon P.G. Paramedical College and Hospital admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

placements.overview: Doon P.G. Paramedical College and Hospital is located in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 11 courses across 7 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Doon P.G. Paramedical College and Hospital programs include B.Sc., M.Sc., BPT and MPT. Doon P.G. Paramedical College and Hospital courses are provided in various streams such as Science and Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute can accommodate a total seat intake of 375 students for its courses. The fees at the institute ranges between INR 1,35,000 and 2,80,000 for the different courses. The institute has state-of-the-art infrastructure with various facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty are too good and provide better quality of education .

review_content.Placements: As a medical student, we have a placement of 100% package, which depends on various hospitals, mostly Max and Indresh. Roles offered are junior physiotherapist and medical lab technology; we can also set up private clinical practices for increasing our capacity.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-equipped with beds and everything; labs are well-equipped with models and other things. Medical labs are well-equipped with microscopes and other high-end facilities that a student can use and a well-equipped library with journals and magazines.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: An Honest Review on the College.

review_content.Placements: There are 30-50 students in a class per year. The yearly fees are around 65,000. There is no internship available in the college, and you can opt for any hospital according to your preference and likeness. Admission can be done through online or offline mode.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is poor, and the campus is not so big when compared to other colleges or universities. A library is available, but it is also not so big, with fewer books, and the books are not updated so far from what I remember. Hostels are provided, and buses are available for students, which is a plus point.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: This is the best college for any course you may be interested in.

review_content.Placements: This college is good in everything and gives 80% placements to its students.
review_content.Infrastructure: n addition to attending classes, most college students need to work during study time, meet with professors and classmates, visit the library, eat in the dining halls, participate in extracurricular activities, and engage in other activities. This is all in addition to having a social life and trying to get some sleep.
review_content.Faculty: The examinations are also among the best and well-maintained in this college. An exam is a test. Many things may be examined, but the word is most often used for an assessment of a person. It measures a test-taker's knowledge, skill, aptitude, physical fitness, ability, or standing in some other subject. It is a set of questions designed to measure those things. This course is good for me and my opportunities, and this college is good and provides me with the best knowledge and explanations about everything related to this course.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Pharmaceutical Chemistry - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Very good faculty and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: I got a good teacher and student surrounding, and it was the best experience for me. In my batch, there were 60 students, and we all got placed. The highest package was 1.20 LPA, and the lowest was 1 LPA. We can work in hospitals and clinics, and we can perform as nurses and in the OT.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are good classrooms and infrastructure, and we have a library with many types of books, both old and the latest additions. We have free Wi-Fi, and its speed is super. Our hostel was good and well-maintained. Every time, light is available, and the water supply is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Microbiology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college faculty members are friendly.

review_content.Placements: In our college, more than 60% of students are selected for good hospitals. At the hospital, we can also do our internship. Our best programmes are the B.Sc. in Medical Microbiology and the B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technician. We can do our internship at Doon Hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure lab facilities are good classrooms with good ventilation. The hostel is also good because it provides good food and a pleasant environment for students to study in. Bus service is also provided. You get every book in the library and there are extracurricular activities for students.

review_summary.college_name: Doon P.G. Paramedical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Faculty are too good and provide better quality of education .

content.Placements: As a medical student, we have a placement of 100% package, which depends on various hospitals, mostly Max and Indresh. Roles offered are junior physiotherapist and medical lab technology; we can also set up private clinical practices for increasing our capacity.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-equipped with beds and everything; labs are well-equipped with models and other things. Medical labs are well-equipped with microscopes and other high-end facilities that a student can use and a well-equipped library with journals and magazines.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: An Honest Review on the College.

content.Placements: There are 30-50 students in a class per year. The yearly fees are around 65,000. There is no internship available in the college, and you can opt for any hospital according to your preference and likeness. Admission can be done through online or offline mode.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is poor, and the campus is not so big when compared to other colleges or universities. A library is available, but it is also not so big, with fewer books, and the books are not updated so far from what I remember. Hostels are provided, and buses are available for students, which is a plus point.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college for any course you may be interested in.

content.Placements: This college is good in everything and gives 80% placements to its students.
content.Infrastructure: n addition to attending classes, most college students need to work during study time, meet with professors and classmates, visit the library, eat in the dining halls, participate in extracurricular activities, and engage in other activities. This is all in addition to having a social life and trying to get some sleep.
content.Faculty: The examinations are also among the best and well-maintained in this college. An exam is a test. Many things may be examined, but the word is most often used for an assessment of a person. It measures a test-taker's knowledge, skill, aptitude, physical fitness, ability, or standing in some other subject. It is a set of questions designed to measure those things. This course is good for me and my opportunities, and this college is good and provides me with the best knowledge and explanations about everything related to this course.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Pharmaceutical Chemistry - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very good faculty and infrastructure.

content.Placements: I got a good teacher and student surrounding, and it was the best experience for me. In my batch, there were 60 students, and we all got placed. The highest package was 1.20 LPA, and the lowest was 1 LPA. We can work in hospitals and clinics, and we can perform as nurses and in the OT.
content.Infrastructure: There are good classrooms and infrastructure, and we have a library with many types of books, both old and the latest additions. We have free Wi-Fi, and its speed is super. Our hostel was good and well-maintained. Every time, light is available, and the water supply is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Microbiology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college faculty members are friendly.

content.Placements: In our college, more than 60% of students are selected for good hospitals. At the hospital, we can also do our internship. Our best programmes are the B.Sc. in Medical Microbiology and the B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technician. We can do our internship at Doon Hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure lab facilities are good classrooms with good ventilation. The hostel is also good because it provides good food and a pleasant environment for students to study in. Bus service is also provided. You get every book in the library and there are extracurricular activities for students.

reviews_list.review_title: Best business college in Pune.

review_content.Placements: Around 70-80% of the students get placed every year. The highest package offered is 8-20 Lacs per annum and the average package offered is 2-5 Lacs per annum. Top companies like Infosys, Amazon, Flipkart, Wipro, Swiggy, Zomato, etc. companies visit the campus for placements.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Business Administration - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Symbiosis Center Of Distance Learning.

review_content.Placements: I can say average placements; the number of companies that visit is high but the hiring number of students is low; most of us were rejected in the interview round. The top hiring companies are Global Logic Tech and KPMG. The average package is Rs. 4 lakh per year. Only a few of us get internships. The top role offered is business analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has an electronic library and an e-classroom. My first visit to college was in the fall, and the campus and canteen were both excellent. The college hostel has a call-and-order facility; if you want any food, you can order through the app from the hostel. For sports on big grounds, where Kabbadi, basketball, volleyball and cricket courts are open from morning for us, regular sports events are organized.

reviews.review_heading: This course is actually value for money.
reviews.review_text: I have enrolled for PGDDS. It an amaizing course I got to learn many usefull and important topics of data science. It is an online course, if your are already experienced then this course will definitely help you for good hike. This course is flexible even in terms of exams and learning online offline material is also available. Allover it is a good course

reviews.review_heading: Review of SCDL Pune with more information.
reviews.review_text: The Facilities are large range of Wi-Fi in Campus. Labs are more such as Design lab, development labs and Computer Labs. The Hostel is good and more Clean every day. The Infrastructure is new design with big building for our course. The mess food is great with good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The Facilities and Infrastructure available for our Course is We have more Higher Facilities such as Large Classrooms with all Projectors and Speakers and Smart Board. We have our Own Block building with the Wi-Fi in each class and Labs are well-equipped with all top facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Best business college in Pune.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostel facilities available but you get the PGs near the college which is not so expensive. Students get the Wi-Fi / LAN facilities in the college. Many sports facilities are available for the sports person. The classrooms are big and modern.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Symbiosis Center Of Distance Learning.
reviews.review_text: The college has an electronic library and an e-classroom. My first visit to college was in the fall, and the campus and canteen were both excellent. The college hostel has a call-and-order facility; if you want any food, you can order through the app from the hostel. For sports on big grounds, where Kabbadi, basketball, volleyball and cricket courts are open from morning for us, regular sports events are organized.

reviews.review_heading: Course curriculum is apt!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. Classrooms, labs, and libraries are average. The college provides access to the library database 24*7 by providing access to digital resources which includes e-books, e-newspapers, e-reading, etc. And one can track performance on portals as well.

reviews.review_heading: The college has all the basic facilities.
reviews.review_text:
In a college hostel 2 in a single room, you will be provided with your own wardrobe and table chair for studies and a cot separately for each and the room has an attached washrooms. Food in the hostel is okay and the only veg is provided if non-veg required you will be provided an app by which you are supposed to order and before 6:30 pm you should be inside the hostel PG is available and one is Infront of the college itself and you can find around
Hostel Fee : INR 50000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty members in Our College!
reviews.review_text: Hostels were very decent and beautiful. The best thing was that the hostels were within the college campus only so you do not have to worry about going to classes. Wi-Fi facility was also provided for our studies. Mess food quality was also good and they provided both veg and non veg meals. Many clubs and societies were also present which any student can join.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are separate and safe hostels for girls and boys. All the basic facilities are provided and easily accessible. It is comfortable and fun to stay at the hostel. The hostel registration process is simple, and the fee is average.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students to take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: As it is a distance-learning college, all the classes are conducted online on the website. Students are provided with their profiles. Students can access everything such as e-books, exam-related instructions, fees, study materials dispatch information, recorded lectures, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms of the institute were very good, big, and airy. There was good Wi-Fi all over the campus. It had a good canteen with seating arrangements and a very good library. I was a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SCDL Pune - Symbiosis Centre for Distance Learning.
reviews.review_text: Since it was a distance learning programme, we did not have to attend the college. There was no requirement to stay in the hostel as the course can be easily completed while staying at home as per students own availability.

reviews.review_heading: A good course to join when one is doing a job or pursuing any other professional degree.
reviews.review_text: Symbiosis Centre for Distance Learning is part of the main college, Symbiosis. Regular colleges are there in Pune, Delhi, Bangalore and Nashik. But when I talk about Centre of Distance Learning, it has helping center in every big city, and they are associated with colleges and schools where students can give their exams.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Symbiosis Centre for Distance Learning.
reviews.review_text: SIBM Pune provides state-of-the-art infrastructure to its students. These facilities go a long way in ensuring a productive campus life and providing a perfect backdrop for academic pursuits. SIBM Pune has a new residential campus at Lavale village, and it has become the envy of other educational institutions.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied and absolutely worth it
reviews.review_text:
All assignments, projects, exams and presentations were online.
There was no physical infrastructure but virtual infrastructure.
Weekly updates came through mail and students were asked to complete the task within the specified time.
No physical building exists in this college
Everything is virtual. However, those who opt for classes were given sa center address and they were asked to attend classes located in Delhi and Noida.
